rulings.Case Title: KATIUSKA ABURTO et al VS. ANNA T WONG et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Tuesday, March 10, 2009, line 14, DEFENDANT, LORELLE WONG'S AMENDED MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT/OR IN THE ALTERNATIVE SUMMARY ADJUDICTION. Motion for summary judgment, as to the causes of action one thru thirteen are denied. Triable issue of fact whether Lorelle Wong is an agent for the property owner. Summary Adjudication granted as to the 14th Cause of Action. =(302/CWW/XARH)
